record.field: LibreTranslate is a fully self-hosted, open-source machine translation API that keeps your text on your own infrastructure.

LibreTranslate is a fully self-hosted, open-source machine translation API that keeps your text on your own infrastructure.

It provides a REST API and a simple web UI for neural machine translation powered by the open-source Argos Translate library, with no dependency on proprietary services like Google or Azure. Models can be bundled for fully offline operation, making it a strong fit for teams that need translation without sending data to third parties. Language coverage depends on the Argos models installed, typically spanning a few dozen major world languages.

Key features
  • REST translation API with automatic language detection and batch processing
  • Neural machine translation via Argos Translate, runnable fully offline
  • Built-in web UI plus official client libraries and integrations
  • Optional API keys for per-user request and character quotas (local SQLite)
  • HTML-aware translation and alternative-translation suggestions
  • Docker, Docker Compose, and Kubernetes deployment with optional CUDA GPU acceleration
Best for

Developers and organizations that need a private, cost-free translation API for apps, content pipelines, or compliance-sensitive workflows (GDPR, HIPAA, data sovereignty) without relying on commercial cloud translators.

services: libretranslate: image: libretranslate/libretranslate:latest restart: unless-stopped ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:5000' environment: - LT_API_KEYS=true - LT_API_KEYS_DB_PATH=/app/db/api_keys.db volumes: - ./libretranslate_models:/home/libretranslate/.local - ./libretranslate_api_keys:/app/db container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
